reviews.comment:
Voy porque es la YPF del ACA, pero no me gusta la atención, no tienen QR, tenés siempre mucha espera.

(Translated by Google)
I go there because it's the YPF station at the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), but I don't like the service, they don't have QR codes, and there's always a long wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzM1lpaXV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo edificio.
Abajo podes cargar combustible.
Tieme un minimercado donde podes comprar bebidas comidas te dirven cafe te gaseosa. Etc. Golosinas.
Tiene el Museo del automovil con antiguedades como autos de carrera de formula uno.
Arriba podes sacar la licencia de conducir.
Etc.
Que te pareció a vos?

(Translated by Google)
Very nice building.
You can get gas downstairs.
It has a mini-market where you can buy drinks, food, coffee, soda, etc. And candy.
It has a car museum with antiques like Formula One race cars.
Upstairs you can get your driver's license.
Etc.
What did you think?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzenAteGNREAE
